RegisterUser.description: POST /api/users — creates a new user account

methods.register: Controller method — validates @RequestBody and calls UserService
methods.checkEmailUniqueness: Queries UserRepository to reject duplicate emails
methods.dispatchWelcomeEmail: Publishes ApplicationEvent picked up by EmailService

AuthenticateUser.description: POST /api/auth/login — validates credentials and returns JWT

methods.authenticate: Runs Spring Security AuthenticationManager with credentials
methods.generateToken: JwtTokenProvider signs claims with secret and expiry

GetOrderHistory.description: GET /api/orders — returns paginated order list for current user

methods.getOrders: Controller method — extracts userId from JWT then paginates
methods.fetchByUser: OrderRepository query filtered by userId with Pageable
methods.mapToDto: Converts Order entity to OrderResponseDto (hides internals)

ProcessPayment.description: POST /api/payments — charges customer and records transaction

methods.charge: Controller method — delegates to PaymentService inside @Transactional
methods.callStripe: StripeClient wraps Stripe SDK charge call with error mapping
methods.recordTransaction: Persists PaymentTransaction entity on successful charge
methods.rollbackOrder: Sets order status to PAYMENT_FAILED if charge throws
